metadata.name: Prepare Return with Foreign Bank Account Reporting (FBAR)

description: A U.S. resident has financial accounts in a foreign country and needs to file an FBAR (FinCEN Form 114).

nodes.task_description: Gather information on all foreign financial accounts, including the maximum value of each account during the year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all necessary foreign account data.

nodes.task_description: Determine if the aggregate value of the accounts exceeded the $10,000 filing threshold.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that an FBAR filing is required.

nodes.task_description: Electronically file the FBAR with the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) by the deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully completes the separate FBAR filing.
